title.name: Professional and Occupational Licensing, Certification, Title Protection and Registration. Examining Boards

sections.heading: Secs. 20-650 to 20-656. Definitions. State Board of Examiners of Shorthand Reporters. License required for use of title and practice of shorthand reporting; exception. Application for licensure; fees. Examination; licenses; renewal; continuing education; regulations; reinstatement. Exemptions. Suspension or revocation of license; reinstatement; display of license number; civil penalty.

body: Sections 20-650 to 20-656 , inclusive, are repealed, effective January 1, 2018.
content.plainText: Sections 20-650 to 20-656 , inclusive, are repealed, effective January 1, 2018.
